text: Aaj phir bahu ne sabke samne meri tulna apni beti se ki aur kaha ki unke ghar ke buzurg kitne 'active' hain. Uske baad se mere sir mein itna bhayanak dard hai jaise nasein phat jayengi aur aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Itni thakan hai ki mujhse pooja ke liye bhi utha nahi ja raha, pura badan jaise pathar ho gaya hai.

Jab bahu ne taana maara ki unki beti ne career aur parivaar dono bina kisi help ke sambhale aur main sirf 'bojh' hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan shuru ho gayi. Kal raat se kuch bhi hazam nahi ho raha aur seene mein aisi bhari-pan hai jaise koi aag lagi ho. Is joint family ke kalesh mein meri tabiyat itni gir gayi hai ki haath-pair bilkul thande pad gaye hain.

Har waqt bahu ka domination aur unki beti se comparison sunte-sunte mera gala ghutne lagta hai aur dimaag sunn ho jata hai. Aaj phir wahi behes hui aur tabse meri saans phool rahi hai, lagta hai jaise dil par kisi ne bhari pathar rakh diya ho. Itni kamzori aa gayi hai ki dawai ki sheeshi uthate waqt bhi mere haath kaanp rahe hain par koi dekhne wala nahi.

Privacy toh zero hai is ghar mein, upar se bahu ne aaj phir mere budhape par chot ki aur nanad ki tareefo ke pull baandh diye. Us argument ke baad se meri pith aur kandhon mein aisi jakdan ho rahi hai ki main seedhi khadi bhi nahi ho pa rahi hoon. Pura sharir jaise toot raha hai aur ajeeb si bechaini ho rahi hai jisse neend hi nahi aa rahi.

Jab bhi bahu meri health aur parivaar ki 'izzat' ko lekar apni beti ki tareef karti hai, mere kaano mein seetiyaan bajne lagti hain aur sir chakkar khane lagta hai. Aaj subah se itni thakan hai ki lagta hai bukhar chadh jayega aur pura badan dukh raha hai. Mujhse ab ye ignored rehna aur roz ka kalesh bardaasht nahi ho raha, sharir jawab de raha hai.
